title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1000 - Citation of law
text:
351.1000.  Citation of law. — Sections 351.1000 to 351.1228 shall be known and may be cited as the "Missouri Cooperative Associations Act".  Any cooperative formed under sections 351.1000 to 351.1228 shall not be subject to the provisions regarding cooperative associations found under sections 357.010 to 357.190, and cooperative associations formed under sections 357.010 to 357.190 shall not be subject to the provisions hereunder.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
